revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please add categories at the bottom of this page, and interwikis at Wikidata (see Wikipedia:Wikidata) -->
== Usage == * Like {{lts|tlx}} and {{tlx|tlsp}} for up to three parameters, used in template lists adding links in the same style as {{tlx|lts/}} and {{tlx|tlrow}}. See above for an example what it does. * {{tlx|tetl}} now covers the previously separate '''tetlp'''{{\}}'''tnetlp'''{{\}}'''tnetl''' templates.
== Comparison == {{tl-nav}}
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Add categories below this line, and interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please add categories at the bottom of this page, and interwikis at Wikidata (see Wikipedia:Wikidata) -->
== Usage == * Like {{lts|tlx}} and {{tlx|tlsp}} for up to three parameters, used in template lists adding links in the same style as {{tlx|lts/}} and {{tlx|tlrow}}. See above for an example what it does. * {{tlx|tetl}} now covers the previously separate '''tetlp'''{{\}}'''tnetlp'''{{\}}'''tnetl''' templates.
== Comparison == {{tl-nav}}
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Add categories below this line, and interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please add categories at the bottom of this page, and interwikis at Wikidata (see Wikipedia:Wikidata) -->
== Usage == * Like {{lts|tlx}} and {{tlx|tlsp}} for up to three parameters, used in template lists adding links in the same style as {{tlx|lts/}} and {{tlx|tlrow}}. See above for an example what it does. * {{tlx|tetl}} now covers the previously separate '''tetlp'''{{\}}'''tnetlp'''{{\}}'''tnetl''' templates.
== Comparison == {{tl-nav}}
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Add categories below this line, and interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please add categories at the bottom of this page, and interwikis at Wikidata (see Wikipedia:Wikidata) -->
== Usage == * Like {{lts|tlx}} and {{tlx|tlsp}} for up to three parameters, used in template lists adding links in the same style as {{tlx|lts/}} and {{tlx|tlrow}}. See above for an example what it does. * {{tlx|tetl}} now covers the previously separate '''tetlp'''{{\}}'''tnetlp'''{{\}}'''tnetl''' templates.
== Comparison == {{tl-nav}}
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Add categories below this line, and interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] }}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23630749988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please add categories at the bottom of this page, and interwikis at Wikidata (see Wikipedia:Wikidata) -->
== Usage == * Like {{lts|tlx}} and {{tlx|tlsp}} for up to three parameters, used in template lists adding links in the same style as {{tlx|lts/}} and {{tlx|tlrow}}. See above for an example what it does. * {{tlx|tetl}} now covers the previously separate '''tetlp'''{{\}}'''tnetlp'''{{\}}'''tnetl''' templates.
== Comparison == {{tl-nav}}
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Add categories below this line, and interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
